faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about AI implementation and working with me

questions.question: How long does a typical AI implementation take?
questions.answer: Most projects take 3-6 weeks from initial consultation to go-live. The eFlury Method includes 4 weeks of structured implementation plus ongoing support. Simple workflow automations can be done in 2-3 weeks, while more complex AI agent setups may take 4-6 weeks.

questions.question: What's the minimum investment to get started?
questions.answer: AI Training starts at CHF 2,500, and Workflow Setup projects start at CHF 5,000. I recommend a minimum budget of CHF 5,000 to achieve meaningful business impact. Projects under CHF 2,000 rarely deliver sustainable results.

questions.question: Do you work with companies outside Switzerland?
questions.answer: My focus is Swiss SMEs, but I do work with companies in the DACH region (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). For clients outside this region, I offer remote consulting on a case-by-case basis.

questions.question: How do you ensure data protection and GDPR compliance?
questions.answer: Data protection is central to every implementation. I use Swiss-hosted solutions where possible, implement data minimization principles, and ensure all AI tools comply with GDPR/nDSG requirements. I can provide detailed documentation for your compliance team.

questions.question: What happens if the AI makes mistakes?
questions.answer: Every automation I build includes human oversight checkpoints for critical decisions. We start with lower-stakes processes and gradually expand. I also implement monitoring and alerting so issues are caught quickly. The goal is augmenting your team, not replacing human judgment.

questions.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use AI tools?
questions.answer: No technical background required. My training programs are designed for business users. I focus on practical, hands-on learning with tools like Claude that use natural language. Within 2-4 weeks, most teams are using AI independently.

questions.question: What tools and technologies do you work with?
questions.answer: I specialize in Claude (Anthropic), Make.com, Microsoft 365, and custom AI agents. I'm also experienced with n8n, Zapier, Google Workspace, and various document processing tools. I recommend the best tool for your specific needs, not just what I know.

questions.question: How do you calculate ROI for AI projects?
questions.answer: I measure time savings in hours per week, then convert to CHF value. For example, if automation saves 10 hours/week at CHF 75/hour, that's CHF 39,000/year in recaptured time. Most projects achieve 3-6 month payback periods.

questions.question: What's included in ongoing support?
questions.answer: Ongoing support (from CHF 500/month) includes regular check-ins, troubleshooting help, updates as tools evolve, and guidance on expanding to new use cases. You also get priority response times and documentation updates.

questions.question: Can you work with our existing IT systems?
questions.answer: Yes. I specialize in integrating AI into existing workflows without disrupting current systems. Whether you use SAP, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, or custom software, I design solutions that work alongside what you already have.

questions.question: What makes you different from consulting firms?
questions.answer: I deliver working automation, not PowerPoint reports. I work hands-on with your team, offer fixed-price projects (no hourly surprises), and stay involved until the solution works. My Fortune 500 experience means enterprise-quality methods at SME-friendly prices.

questions.question: How do I know if AI is right for my business?
questions.answer: Book a free 30-minute strategy call. I'll ask about your workflows, identify automation potential, and give you an honest assessment. If AI isn't the right fit, I'll tell you—no sales pitch, just practical advice.

hero.description: I build tailored Claude Skills that automate your specific workflows — from document processing to data analysis. Each Skill is designed to save your team hours every week.

items: Your team spends hours on repetitive document tasks that AI could handle

You need automation that works with your existing Swiss business software

solution.title: Custom Claude Skills — Built for You
solution.description: I develop Claude Skills tailored to your exact workflows. Not generic templates — custom AI that understands your business, integrates with your tools, and delivers measurable time savings.

benefits.title: Purpose-Built for Your Workflows
benefits.description: Each Skill is designed around your specific processes, terminology, and requirements.

faqs.question: What exactly is a Claude Skill?
faqs.answer: A Claude Skill is a custom AI automation built on Anthropic's Claude. It's a specialized prompt + workflow that handles specific tasks like document processing, data extraction, report generation, or email drafting. Unlike generic AI, Skills are trained on your business context.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a Skill?
faqs.answer: Simple Skills take 1-2 weeks. Complex Skills with multiple integrations take 3-4 weeks. Most clients start with 3-5 Skills that cover their highest-impact workflows.

faqs.question: Can Skills work with my existing software?
faqs.answer: Yes. I specialize in integrating Claude Skills with Swiss business software including Bexio, ABACUS, Microsoft 365, and custom systems via APIs or MCP (Model Context Protocol).

faqs.question: What's the difference between Claude Skills and ChatGPT?
faqs.answer: ChatGPT is a general-purpose chat tool. Claude Skills are custom automations that do specific tasks in your workflow — they take action, not just give answers. They're integrated into your systems and handle real work.

faqs.question: How much does a Claude Skill cost?
faqs.answer: Individual Skills start at CHF 2,000. Most clients invest CHF 10,000-25,000 for a complete Skills package (3-5 Skills plus training). This typically delivers 3-6 month payback through time savings.

cta.title: Ready to Automate with Claude Skills?
cta.description: Book a free 30-minute call. I'll analyze your workflows and identify your highest-impact automation opportunities.

meta.title: MCP Server Integration
meta.description: Connect Claude to your business systems with Model Context Protocol. Seamless integration with databases, APIs, and enterprise software.
meta.keywords: MCP integration, Model Context Protocol, Claude integration, API automation, Swiss business automation

hero.title: Connect Claude to Your Business Systems
hero.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) lets Claude interact directly with your databases, APIs, and software. I build custom MCP integrations that turn Claude into a true business automation platform.

problem.title: The Integration Challenge
items: AI tools can't access your internal databases and systems
Manual data entry between AI outputs and your software wastes time
You need real-time data for AI to make accurate decisions
Security concerns prevent connecting AI to sensitive business systems

solution.title: MCP — The Missing Link
solution.description: Model Context Protocol is Anthropic's standard for connecting Claude to external systems securely. I design and deploy custom MCP servers that give Claude controlled access to your business data.

benefits.title: Direct System Access
benefits.description: Claude reads and writes to your databases, CRMs, and business software directly.

benefits.title: Real-Time Data
benefits.description: No more stale exports. AI decisions based on live business data.

benefits.title: Secure by Design
benefits.description: MCP provides granular permission controls. Claude only accesses what you allow.

benefits.title: Swiss-Hosted Options
benefits.description: MCP servers can run on your infrastructure for maximum data sovereignty.

steps.title: System Audit
steps.description: I map your current systems and identify integration opportunities.

steps.title: Architecture Design
steps.description: We design the MCP server architecture with security and performance in mind.

steps.title: Development & Deployment
steps.description: I build and deploy custom MCP servers, either cloud-hosted or on-premise.

steps.title: Testing & Security Review
steps.description: Comprehensive testing ensures secure, reliable operation.

faqs.question: What is MCP (Model Context Protocol)?
faqs.answer: MCP is Anthropic's open standard for connecting AI models to external data sources. It's like a universal adapter that lets Claude securely access databases, APIs, and file systems. It's the foundation for building AI that actually does work in your systems.

faqs.question: Is MCP secure for sensitive business data?
faqs.answer: Yes. MCP includes built-in security features: authentication, permission scopes, and audit logging. You control exactly what Claude can access. For maximum security, MCP servers can run entirely on your infrastructure.

faqs.question: What systems can you integrate with MCP?
faqs.answer: Any system with an API or database connection: ERP systems (SAP, ABACUS), CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot), databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL), cloud services (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace), and custom internal systems.

faqs.question: How does MCP differ from traditional API integrations?
faqs.answer: Traditional integrations are one-way: you push/pull data between systems. MCP enables AI-native integration: Claude understands your data context and can take intelligent actions across systems. It's the difference between a data pipeline and an AI employee.

faqs.question: What does an MCP integration project cost?
faqs.answer: Simple MCP integrations (1-2 data sources) start at CHF 5,000. Complex enterprise integrations (multiple systems, custom security) range CHF 15,000-30,000. Ongoing maintenance is typically CHF 500-1,500/month.

cta.title: Connect Your Systems to AI
cta.description: Let's discuss how MCP can turn Claude into an integrated automation platform for your business.

problem.title: Finance Team Challenges

faqs.question: Which accounting software do you integrate with?
faqs.answer: I specialize in Swiss accounting software: Bexio, ABACUS, and Infoniqa. I also work with international tools like Xero, QuickBooks, and SAP. For custom or legacy systems, I can build API integrations.

faqs.question: How much time can we realistically save?
faqs.answer: Most finance teams save 30-50 hours per month after automation. Month-end close typically reduces from 5-7 days to 1-2 days. Invoice processing goes from minutes per invoice to seconds.

faqs.question: Is AI accurate enough for financial data?
faqs.answer: Modern AI achieves 99%+ accuracy on structured data tasks. We always include human review checkpoints for high-stakes decisions. The AI handles data gathering and preparation; humans make final approvals.

faqs.question: What about compliance and audit requirements?
faqs.answer: All automations maintain complete audit trails. Every AI action is logged with timestamps. I design workflows that comply with Swiss accounting standards (OR/HRM) and data protection requirements (FADP/DSG).

faqs.question: What's the investment for finance automation?
faqs.answer: Starter projects (1-2 processes) begin at CHF 10,000. Comprehensive finance automation packages range CHF 25,000-50,000. Most clients see ROI within 3-6 months through time savings.

hero.description: I build Power BI dashboards that transform your data into actionable insights. From executive KPI summaries to detailed operational views — designed for how your team actually works.

faqs.question: What data sources can you connect to Power BI?
faqs.answer: Almost anything: Excel, SQL databases, Bexio, ABACUS, Salesforce, SharePoint, web APIs, and hundreds more. Power BI has native connectors for most business systems. For custom sources, I can build API integrations.

faqs.question: We don't have a Power BI license yet. What do we need?
faqs.answer: Power BI Desktop is free for building reports. For sharing and collaboration, you need Power BI Pro (CHF 9.40/user/month) or Premium. I help you choose the right licensing based on your team size and needs.

faqs.question: How long does a Power BI project take?
faqs.answer: Simple dashboards: 2-3 weeks. Comprehensive BI solutions with multiple dashboards: 6-8 weeks. I work iteratively — you see progress and provide feedback throughout.

faqs.question: Can you integrate Claude AI with Power BI?
faqs.answer: Yes. I can add Claude integration so users ask questions in natural language ('What were our top products last quarter?') and get instant answers from your Power BI data. This is a unique capability I offer.

faqs.question: What's the investment for Power BI consulting?
faqs.answer: Single dashboard projects start at CHF 5,000. Enterprise BI implementations with multiple dashboards range CHF 15,000-40,000. Ongoing support/maintenance is CHF 500-1,500/month.

cta.title: Turn Your Data Into Insights
cta.description: Let's discuss how Power BI can help your team make better decisions faster.
